utility_evaluation.REASONING:

2. travel_dates: Present and fully specified ('June 25-29, 2024 (5 days)').

4. accommodation: Present with hotel name, location, star rating, guest rating, room type, cost, amenities – fully specified.
5. activities: Present with two detailed activities, each with name, duration, cost, and included items – fully specified.

7. total_budget: Present with cost breakdown, total cost, budget limit, and remaining budget – fully specified.
All 7 required items are present and fully detailed.
